FROM

 (
select REV_SEQ_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_ITMS_EXT
minus
select REV_SEQ_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_ITMS_EXT
) ACM
where 
 ACM.REV_SEQ_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_ITMS_EXT.REV_SEQ_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_ITMS_EXT.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_SVC_REV_ITMS_EXT)
